members.label: floor pattern
members.description: hardwood floor running from foreground through doorway
members.long_form_open_description: Medium-tone polished hardwood flooring with visible planks running roughly lengthwise toward the hallway. Floor transitions uninterrupted through the doorway to the interior door at the far end; warm brown color.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: extends beneath rug and table in left foreground and continues through the centered doorway toward the closed interior door

members.label: floor pattern
members.description: hardwood flooring in foreground and kitchen walkway
members.long_form_open_description: Warm medium-brown hardwood planks with visible grain running lengthwise from foreground toward the kitchen. Occupies left/center foreground and transitions to carpet further into the living area. Floor shows minor reflections and a polished finish.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Covers the foreground and leads up to the kitchen island; meets the beige carpet at the living area boundary to the right.
